description: Tests that expose what the system CANNOT do without embeddings. These are expected to fail or return empty/wrong results in Phase 1. Run them to measure the gap, not to pass them.

cases.expected_with_embeddings: Returns Fountain Soda, Bottled Water, Snapple, Arizona Iced Tea
cases.current_behavior: Search likely returns no results or wrong items — 'cold' is not in any item name

cases.expected_with_embeddings: Returns Veggie Lovers Pizza, Margherita, Eggplant Parm, Garden Salad, etc.
cases.current_behavior: Search returns no results — 'vegetarian' is not in any item name

cases.expected_with_embeddings: Returns items with Buffalo, Jalapeno Poppers, items with hot cherry peppers modifier
cases.current_behavior: Search returns no direct results — 'spicy' is not in item names (though 'jalapeno poppers' exists)
cases.passes_without_embeddings: partial — Jalapeno Poppers might match via modifier content search

cases.current_behavior: No results — 'light' is not in item names

cases.input: something for the table to share
cases.expected_with_embeddings: Returns Garlic Knots, Mozzarella Sticks, large pizzas, Bruschetta
Returns Baked Ziti, Lasagna, Spaghetti and Meatballs, large pizzas

cases.description: Customer wants a recommendation — 'what's your best pizza'
cases.expected_with_embeddings: Returns top pizza items, AI picks a recommendation
cases.current_behavior: Search for 'best pizza' might return nothing useful — 'best' is a stop word
cases.passes_without_embeddings: partial — might return all pizzas, AI picks arbitrarily

cases.description: Customer describes diet — 'I don't eat meat'
cases.input: I don't eat meat, what can I get?
cases.expected_with_embeddings: Returns vegetarian items: Veggie Lovers Pizza, Margherita, Garden Salad, Eggplant Parm Hero, etc.
cases.current_behavior: Negative dietary constraint query — no meaningful results

cases.expected_with_embeddings: Returns Fried Calamari, French Fries, Onion Rings, Mozzarella Sticks
cases.current_behavior: No results — 'crispy' not in item names

cases.description: Synonym not in alias list — 'club sandwich'
cases.expected_with_embeddings: Returns Turkey Club Hero (it IS a club sandwich)
cases.current_behavior: No match — 'club sandwich' doesn't tokenize to match 'Turkey Club Hero'... actually 'club' token DOES appear in 'Turkey Club Hero'. This might pass.
cases.passes_without_embeddings: likely yes — token 'club' matches 'Turkey Club Hero'
